text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Our student council activities involve a lot of
photography today...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Quite frankly, I'm fed up with it... But as the
Empress, this is my duty.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I must embody everyone's ideals in physical form.
If that means enduring photoshoots, so be it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Although, I could do without the flash... My
eyes...
